image_prompt_master: photographic cinematic storyboard keyframe. single static frame for a voiced comic animatic. visual style: Cinematic Realism v1. mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting. palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. stable character identity across shots. consistent environment layout and prop continuity. clean frame, no captions, no watermark, no user interface.
image_prompt_scene: scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. must keep set elements: red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. match scene anchors: A wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right; B table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp; C rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge.
image_prompt_characters: character lock: Protagonist A (charA_v1), hair: short_black, outfit: white_hoodie + black_jeans, accessories: silver_ring_left_hand.
image_prompt_props: prop lock: Red Mug (mug_red_v1), state: story_clue, must remain visually consistent.
image_prompt_shot: shot S003. camera intent: comic_panel_03. action beats: 手机忽然亮起，屏幕上只有一行字：别喝。; 林澈低声说：这是谁发的？. narration intent: 旁白 explains "手机忽然亮起，屏幕上只有一行字：别喝。". dialogue mood: 林澈 says "这是谁发的？". continuity locks: charA_v1 (location: apartment_kitchen_or_hallway, pose: frozen); mug_red_v1 (location: near_main_character, state: warm_and_unexplained). Shot-to-shot continuity: maintain exact character identity, scene layout, lighting and prop positions from previous shot. Visual style must match preceding frame. shot positive notes: cinematic realistic suspense comic panel, stable young Chinese man identity, rainy old apartment, red mug as recurring clue, coherent low-cost storyboard frame.
image_prompt_final: photographic cinematic storyboard keyframe. single static frame for a voiced comic animatic. visual style: Cinematic Realism v1. mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting. palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. stable character identity across shots. consistent environment layout and prop continuity. clean frame, no captions, no watermark, no user interface. scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. must keep set elements: red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. match scene anchors: A wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right; B table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp; C rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge. character lock: Protagonist A (charA_v1), hair: short_black, outfit: white_hoodie + black_jeans, accessories: silver_ring_left_hand. prop lock: Red Mug (mug_red_v1), state: story_clue, must remain visually consistent. shot S003. camera intent: comic_panel_03. action beats: 手机忽然亮起，屏幕上只有一行字：别喝。; 林澈低声说：这是谁发的？. narration intent: 旁白 explains "手机忽然亮起，屏幕上只有一行字：别喝。". dialogue mood: 林澈 says "这是谁发的？". continuity locks: charA_v1 (location: apartment_kitchen_or_hallway, pose: frozen); mug_red_v1 (location: near_main_character, state: warm_and_unexplained). Shot-to-shot continuity: maintain exact character identity, scene layout, lighting and prop positions from previous shot. Visual style must match preceding frame. shot positive notes: cinematic realistic suspense comic panel, stable young Chinese man identity, rainy old apartment, red mug as recurring clue, coherent low-cost storyboard frame.
negative_prompt: cartoon, neon cyberpunk (unless explicitly requested), sunlight, daylight, modern led lights, crowd, text artifacts, logo, watermark, extra fingers, face drift, outfit change, prop drift, wrong set layout, subtitles burned into image
continuity_notes: continuity locks: charA_v1 (location: apartment_kitchen_or_hallway, pose: frozen); mug_red_v1 (location: near_main_character, state: warm_and_unexplained)

manual_workflow.external_generation: paste image_prompt_final and negative_prompt into any web image/video tool; upload reference_images when supported
manual_workflow.context_hint: Use context_keyframes as visual reference to maintain shot-to-shot continuity with previous shot.
